docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY PETTWAY, DWAYNE DBA I ROOTER & PLUMBING AS TO DEFENDANT KWAN, CECILIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-14-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF DWAYNE PETTWAY IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CECILIA KWAN IS PRESENT WITH BRADEN KWAN, HUSBAND WOULD LIKE TO SPEAK ON HALF OF HIS WIFE (SEE SCANNED SC-109 DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.). DEFENDANT WAIVE SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) BRADEN KWAN, HUSBAND OF CECILIA KWAN. FILED BY DEFENDANT KWAN, CECILIA
